name: The Amazing Digital Circus
description:
The Amazing Digital Circus characters made by Gooseworx

Characters: Pomni, Ragatha, Jax, Gangle, Kinger, Zooble, Caine, Bubble, Abstraction and Gummigo.

Plot: One moment you're job, the next you're trapped in the surreal and unsettling Digital Circus. Your real body is lost, transformed into a digital avatar with no way out. Stuck forever with a bizarre crew of fellow prisoners – from the anxious clown to the sadistic rabbit – under the watch of the gleefully AI, Caine. Survival means navigating absurd adventures and resisting the madness of this digital circus.

Art by: Vyansya (u/Vyansya)

‼️Warning‼️: To not use this with JLLM it it will not work because of his limit memory of 9k and also because he is very bad at not talking for {{user}} or making accurate character pesonalities and responses i recomend to use Proxy on this bot (With any Deepseek especially the new ones that has <think> on it because it has big memory size of 128k and better accuracy in characters pesonalities and responses.)
